func HTMLEscape(w io.Writer, b []byte) {
	last := 0
	for i, c := range b {
		var html []byte
		switch c {
		case '\000':
			html = htmlNull
		case '"':
			html = htmlQuot
		case '\'':
			html = htmlApos
		case '&':
			html = htmlAmp
		case '<':
			html = htmlLt
		case '>':
			html = htmlGt
		default:
			continue
		}
		w.Write(b[last:i])
		w.Write(html)
		last = i + 1
	}
	w.Write(b[last:])
}
